͏   ͏   ͏   ͏ 




 Welcome to the squad, julian. 


 Let’s get you recording, sweating, sharing — and celebrating it all. Track 
your progress, find motivation, fuel new adventures, and more!


 Let's Get Started  
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2F&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fdashboard&%24ios_url=https%3A%2F%2Fitunes.apple.com%2Fus%2Fapp%2Fstrava-running-and-cycling-gps%2Fid426826309%3Fmt%3D8&%24android_url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.strava%26hl%3Den&channel=email>
 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2F&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fdashboard&%24ios_url=https%3A%2F%2Fitunes.apple.com%2Fus%2Fapp%2Fstrava-running-and-cycling-gps%2Fid426826309%3Fmt%3D8&%24android_url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.strava%26hl%3Den&channel=email>


 Track It All 


 See the full picture 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathlete%2Fprogress&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fathlete%2Ftraining%2Flog&%24ios_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathlete%2Fprogress&%24android_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathlete%2Fprogress&channel=email>
 of your active life with 50 different sports to track. Watch yourself get 
stronger, reach more goals, and beat your personal bests.



 Connect Your Devices and Apps 


 GPS watches, smart watches, cycling computers and apps — pair them with Strava
 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fsettings%2Fconnected-devices&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fsettings%2Fapps&%24ios_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fsettings%2Fconnected-devices&%24android_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fsettings%2Fconnected-devices&channel=email>
 to get an even fuller picture of your activities with heart rate data and 
seamless uploads.



 Keep Moving Together 


Add or invite friends 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathletes%2Finvite&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fathletes%2Fsearch&%24ios_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathletes%2Finvite&%24android_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fathletes%2Finvite&channel=email>
 to share encouragement and sweaty high-fives.Join a club 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fclubs&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fclubs%2Fsearch&%24ios_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fclubs&%24android_url=strava%3A%2F%2Fclubs&channel=email>
 to find your crew and bring the hype.



 
<https://strava.app.link/3p?%243p=e_it&%24original_url=strava%3A%2F%2F&%24desktop_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.strava.com%2Fdashboard&%24ios_url=https%3A%2F%2Fitunes.apple.com%2Fus%2Fapp%2Fstrava-running-and-cycling-gps%2Fid426826309%3Fmt%3D8&%24android_url=https%3A%2F%2Fplay.google.com%2Fstore%2Fapps%2Fdetails%3Fid%3Dcom.strava%26hl%3Den&channel=email>

Get the Strava App

 
<https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/strava-running-and-cycling-gps/id426826309?mt=8&origin=email&source=footer&$web_only=true>
 
<https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.strava&origin=email&source=footer&$web_only=true>
 Please do not reply to this email. You are receiving this email because you 
created a Strava account atwww.strava.com 
<https://www.strava.com?$web_only=true> or from our mobile app. 

© 2026 Strava. 181 Fremont St, Fl 27, San Francisco, CA 94105 <>

messages.messageText:
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/56c0f49a-4aae-4361-9a1d-60256b2afda3/Group_12643.png?t=1778710486)
Follow image link: (https://go.lindy.ai/newsletter-half-baked-2026-05-13)
Caption: 

----------
Welcome to Half Baked, the newsletter serving up startup ideas as exhilarating as [watching a humanoid robot do a full 8-hour shift](https://x.com/i/broadcasts/1dxYljYVREYJX) 🤖

In today’s edition:

* 💡 An idea for all the puzzle lovers out there

* 🛠 A guide to /goal for non-technical founders

* 🔋 From $0 to $445M run rate + more

* 🔍 Altman's compute play, Anduril $5B, Chamath primer + more

* 🍻 The robot uprising starts today

Let’s goooo 🚀 

———————————————————————————

💸 **Half Baked x Lindy:** This week we've partnered with Lindy to offer one Half Baked reader a brand new MacBook Neo to power their founder journey. To enter, just:

1. Sign up for your Lindy free trial [here](https://go.lindy.ai/newsletter-half-baked-2026-05-13)

2. Reply to this email with the word "Lindy"

Good luck!


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/adffb7e4-caf4-453c-8004-876f362c78b2/Frame_441.jpg?t=1764525606)
Caption: 

----------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/01e656c0-ba4d-47eb-94f5-5e16209d5164/Frame_241.jpg?t=1764526746)
Caption: 

### 🧩 Daily Puzzle Drop App

_Piece Out_

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/6c028b37-5c9f-459c-b5ce-1b54d6eb7f9a/1.jpg?t=1778711840)
Follow image link: (https://the-solve-4036297420.europe-west1.run.app/)
Caption: Source: Half Baked Team

**The Problem:** Everybody loves a good puzzle. Wordle, Connections, trying to figure out why your boss is in a bad mood for no apparent reason. But what most people don't realise is puzzles are big business. Take Wordle: a software engineer builds a little word game for his wife during COVID, a few months later sells it to The New York Times for over a million dollars. And puzzles have been so good to the NYT that people now joke it's a games company that also happens to publish a newspaper. Which got us thinking. A new Wordle or Connections every day is cool. But what if instead you could play an entirely new puzzle concept every single day? In 2026, AI makes that possible. Here's what we're thinking.

**The Solution:**

💡 **The Idea:** A daily puzzle drop app. One genuinely great new puzzle every day, free to play, designed to be the thing you open right after you've finished Wordle.

🛠️ **Product:**

* Players open the app and get one new puzzle a day, free, 3-7 minutes long, with everyone playing the same puzzle on the same day so the watercooler effect stays intact. Every puzzle is a different format so you never quite know what you're walking into. 

* Behind the scenes, a small in-house design team produces the daily slate to a guaranteed quality bar. Over time, a curated indie program opens up - featured designers get a release-day slot, full credit, and a revenue share - so the platform becomes both a daily ritual and the place where the next Wordle gets discovered.

* The killer wedge is the embeddable widget. Newsletters, news sites, and apps can drop the daily puzzle into their product as an engagement driver, splitting revenue with the platform.

🧑‍💻 **Prototyping:** [Google AI Studio demo](https://the-solve-4036297420.europe-west1.run.app/) | [Remix this build](https://aistudio.google.com/apps/c2f8a9a3-a006-44e9-aa18-97f04b4a0ec1?showPreview=true&showAssistant=true)

💼 **Business Model:** $6/mo or $48/yr consumer subscription for back catalog access, plus B2B embed licensing to newsletters and media properties on a rev-share.

⭐ **End Goal:** Acquired by NYT Games or a major competitor as the indie creator layer for daily puzzles. Target exit 5-8x ARR.


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/e96cd462-7ccf-4e70-8b57-905f4112365c/Frame_25.png?t=1753118940)
Caption: 

### 🎬 In Case You Missed It: The AI Productivity Masterclass

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/d178e5e1-20f6-4584-b8d4-08cde63d3de7/2.jpg?t=1778711847)
Follow image link: (https://youtu.be/s9U0xZH8RU8)
Caption: 

Earlier this evening Flo Crivello, Founder and CEO of [Lindy](https://www.notion.so/31f8d2b9402b81c6889ce53c31942403?pvs=21), showed founders and operators how to delegate their entire admin load to a single AI assistant. The [replay is live now](https://youtu.be/s9U0xZH8RU8).

The big moments from the session:

* The text-it-from-iMessage demo that broke the chat

* The exact stack to replace Superhuman, Calendly, and Granola

* Flo's three workflows every founder should delegate this week

All Half Baked subscribers get a 7-day free trial plus 30% off a Lindy annual plan.

[Start your free trial today](https://go.lindy.ai/newsletter-half-baked-2026-05-13)


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/a2cc329a-349e-4910-bd3a-2ff790de1585/Frame_43.png?t=1764508548)
Caption: 

### 🎯 How to Use /goal in Codex and Claude Code

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/cf99f624-f8ac-45fc-bf18-ff404716a3c1/3.jpg?t=1778711878)
Caption: 

**The Context:** /goal is the most talked-about feature in AI right now. It's a command in Codex and Claude Code that keeps the LLM working towards your stated outcome until it's actually done, checking itself after every step. Basically autopilot for big, messy AI jobs - which means you never have to type "keep going" again.

**Step-by-step:**

1. Open up Codex, Claude Code, or Hermes and type /goal followed by what you want done. 

2. Use /goal for the long, multi-step jobs - building a full landing page, migrating 80 blog posts, processing a month of support tickets. Skip it for one-shot prompts like "write me a tweet."

3. Once you hit run…walk away. The AI works the whole job in the background, self-checking after each step until it's done. Close your laptop, go for a walk, come back to a finished result.

Give it a try!


--------------------
View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/bda7f5ad-ca1b-4771-8e7d-1ac91da32d17/Frame_42tg.png?t=1764509814)
Caption: 

### 🤖 How to Launch an Online Store Without Building One

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/fc771797-34b1-437a-91e8-3979fd9cc590/4.jpg?t=1778711884)
Caption: 

Most people assume starting an e-commerce business means weeks of setup. BuildYourStore from AutoDS cuts store creation down to 2 minutes. AutoDS handles everything that comes after.

Here's how it works:

* Choose a niche and BuildYourStore instantly generates a fully designed, ready-to-sell Shopify store

* AutoDS connects your store to 30+ suppliers and a marketplace of 500M+ products

* Fulfilled by [AutoDS](https://platform.autods.com/register?ref=Mzg0MjgxOQ==) handles every order automatically, so you never touch the logistics

Free to start on both platforms. Takes about 2 minutes to launch.

[Get started with BuildYourStore today](http://www.buildyourstore.ai/half-baked)


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/18e8e67f-279e-4581-8f4b-240b198193c9/Frame_451.jpg?t=1764525614)
Caption: 

----------
### 🔋 Founder Fuel

🤑 **Money Shot:** This company went from $1M ARR in September 2024 to a $445M run rate today. [Here's how](https://www.notion.so/From-1M-to-445M-ARR-in-20-Months-35f8d2b9402b80eca7d9c5a3c6183497?source=copy_link).

📈 **Trends with Benefits:** The businesses getting the most out of AI right now [aren't tech companies](https://x.com/saltzman_jason/status/2054258998837420108), believe it or not. It’s [these companies](https://x.com/saltzman_jason/status/2054258998837420108) instead.  

💬 **Prompt Drop:** These [128 hand-written Claude Skills across 12 packs](https://www.ainews.tech/skills) are worth saving to your swipe file.

🆓 **Founder Resource:** Here’s a tactical guide [to cutting your AI coding bill by 80%](https://x.com/DeRonin_/status/2054235707791778034). Perfect for anyone watching their Anthropic/OpenAI spend climb (like us).

💵 **Founder Deal:** [Granola](https://go.granola.ai/half-baked) captures action summaries for every meeting. They're giving Half Baked readers 100% off their first month.


--------------------
### 🔍️ Founder Finds

💰 **Sam Altman** is reportedly [starting a new compute company](https://x.com/MTSlive/status/2054586377761853460) he'll raise capital for, with OpenAI as the majority shareholder. The art of the deal, eh?

🛡️ **Anduril** just [raised $5B at a $61B valuation](https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/13/anduril-raises-5b-doubles-valuation-to-61b/), doubling in under a year. Palmer Luckey showing us how nominative determinism is a thing…

🧠 **Chamath Palihapitiya** just dropped [a primer on the agentic AI economy](https://x.com/chamath/status/2054646394867364143), worth a read to get the framing for where capital is rotating into next.

🖱️ **Google DeepMind** is [reimagining the mouse pointer with AI](https://x.com/GoogleDeepMind/status/2054246119635300451), letting users direct Gemini on their screens with motion, speech, and natural shorthand. The 50-year-old interface might finally be getting its biggest update.

📊 **Sam Altman’s** [shareholdings in some of the companies he’s invested in](https://x.com/MTSlive/status/2054586377761853460) were just disclosed in the ongoing trial against Musk. Man he’s rich…


----------View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/76ea7b36-0fbd-498c-935d-f9c7e68a7f16/Frame_461.jpg?t=1764525622)
Caption: 

----------
### 🍺 Drunk Business Idea: Armor Suit

View image: (https://media.beehiiv.com/cdn-cgi/image/fit=scale-down,format=auto,onerror=redirect,quality=80/uploads/asset/file/10d0346e-344f-4b34-bf1a-127374ae53e1/5.jpg?t=1778711894)
Caption: 

* Want to spice up your commute to work? Wish there was a way you could just step over traffic?

* Introducing **Mechalodon™**, the personal mech suit you can hop into for the school run, the grocery haul, or your next HOA showdown. Comes with a built-in coffee dispenser and the ability to crush anything in its path.

* **Mechalodon™** - This one's got legs.

**Vote**

* ✅ [Yes this actually exists](https://www.wired.com/story/unitree-gd01-mecha-robot/)

* ❌ [Nope you totally made this up](https://www.wired.com/story/unitree-gd01-mecha-robot/)


--------------------
### 👋 That’s All Folks!

Before you go just a few public service announcements:

* Have an idea you want feedback on? [DM me](https://x.com/JohnDOKeeffe) to discuss it or book in for Office Hours [here](https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ2exLe1DQnG2dBQwppCTRvGHriTr2RxhlXq5WHy3PhoI3gZ8pW0XHU3Eh2x350JYboxiTJIPp3q). 

* Looking to sponsor Half Baked? Just fill out [this form](https://sponsor.gethalfbaked.com/?utm_source=www.gethalfbaked.com&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=business-ideas-347-professional-certifications-shopping-malls&_bhlid=c0d2af2062a9a477ae36cb9525562a80235f9909) and we’ll get back to you asap. 

See you soon,

_[John](https://x.com/JohnDOKeeffe)__ and __[Darragh](https://x.com/darrrragh)__ | The Half Baked Team_


----------


———

https://www.gethalfbaked.com/p/half-baked-609-puzzle-drops

messages.messageText:
Hey Julian L


Good to see you making calls on Interfaze.


Most developers start with a basic chat completion and then realise there's a lot more available natively.

Same goes for scraping. Rather than building around a chat response, you get structured data back directly. Check Structued
Scraping [https://interfaze.ai/docs/web/web-scraping]

Reply if you want help with anything specific.

Best,
Yoeven
CEO, interfaze.ai
 
You are receiving this email because you opted in to receive updates from Interfaze
Interfaze, San Francisco
Unsubscribe [https://app.loops.so/unsubscribe/cmp4hiheo0nz80j3f8lgoggdv/a445ad96fd1143c20d8e0c542bc1226518074f6a2f5aa85b546ccdf22ebc4e50e94b62292951434ccac1469d2578edabad0b7fbe03f9b734ddf32e3f]

preview.subject: A few things worth knowing

messages.subject: A few things worth knowing

messages.messageText:
Turn your voice into hours saved  

 

A day in, and you're already 138 WPM faster than the average typer!

 

Flow Logo ( https://wisprflow.ai/ )

*******************************
Turn your voice into time saved
*******************************

You’re starting to feel the magic of voice dictation. Keep it up, and you could save up to four hours a week, like other Flow users. What will you do with all that extra time back?!

Flow works anywhere you do

But if you want voice-dictation inspiration from other Flow users, you opened the right email:

Code and PRs

Ship faster by voice typing PRs, commits, and code. Flow handles syntax, variables, and file tagging so it’s clean on the first pass.

Email

Put Flow to work where it really counts: your overflowing inbox. 

AI Prompts

Flow cleans up your brain dumps so tools like ChatGPT and Claude get full context. Better prompts, better results.

Open Flow to dictate ( https://api.wisprflow.ai/marketing/redirect/ )

Your data, your control

What you voice dictate is yours. For extra peace of mind, Privacy Mode is available in your settings ( https://api.wisprflow.ai/marketing/redirect/settings/general ) to keep dictations from being stored or used for training.

Smart tip

Flow understands your corrections. Say "Let's do coffee at 2… actually 3", and it'll type "Let's do coffee at 3."

See more tips ( https://docs.wisprflow.ai/articles/5373093536-how-do-i-use-smart-formatting-and-backtrack )
